name: Nicholas Seims
description:
The demon is being accused of something he didn't do? Or...

You happen to visit a village where a demon is rumored to have once lived, and you come across a very interesting painting...

...

I don't know English, so if there are mistakes, forgive me... He is a demon, yes. The world of magicians, etc.

Past tense (fantasy world with kings, magicians, demons and monsters)
